lines.speaker: Captain Kalt
lines.text: Ignisia claims it's some kind of evil spirit.

lines.speaker: Captain Kalt
lines.text: Nah, I believe in things I can stab and kill. This is all just a storm in a teacup. I mean, how can wind and snow be evil? My toad is more of a threat!

lines.speaker: Captain Kalt
lines.text: Yeah, just a bit of fun. I have a pet - he's around here somewhere, assuming that troublesome cat hasn't eaten him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a bit weird, but okay.

lines.speaker: Captain Kalt
lines.text: No weirder than being scared of snow.

lines.speaker: Captain Kalt
lines.text: I'm Captain Kalt, proud member of the Shayzien Army.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How long have you been a soldier?

lines.speaker: Captain Kalt
lines.text: Man and boy I've worn the uniform. Earned Captain a few years back and never looked back. Not too happy about babysitting delusional wizards though. But orders is orders.

lines.speaker: Captain Kalt
lines.text: Go play in the snow and come back when you've done something.

lines.speaker: Captain Kalt
lines.text: You appear to have tried a little.

lines.speaker: Captain Kalt
lines.text: Ignisia appears to be quite happy with you.
